name: Mushroom "Stuff
recipeInstructions:
This recipe came from the board over a year ago, and I'm sorry I don't know who to give credit to, but it's definitely worth trying. It's a wonderful side dish made especially for mushroom lovers!
1. Sauté mushrooms, onions, and celery in butter until just tender. Remove from heat.
2. Add cooked, crumpled bacon and mayonnaise to the sautéed vegetables.
3. In a 9 x 13 inch baking dish, spread 3 slices of buttered bread cubes.
4. Top with the mushroom mixture.
5. Pour milk and beaten eggs over all. Refrigerate for a few hours.
6. Just before baking, add the mushroom soup to the casserole and top with the remaining 3 slices of bread cubes.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour. Add cheese on top and bake an additional 15 minutes longer.
